title: [Clovertooth Hall, Locker Booth]
description: You are standing in a cramped room filled with short stacks of lockers.  One of these lockers has been removed for you and placed on a tiny wooden counter.

wayto.2440: ;e room = Room.current.id;fput 'go curtain'; if ( room == Room.current.id ); fput 'close locker';move 'go curtain'; end; $go2_restart = true
